strategy: Hit with Storm (+20%); it resists Myth 50%.

Kill order matters: if the Butterfly dies before or the same round as its minions, it Blessings the whole side back to full and revives them. Clear all minions first, then kill the Butterfly a round later.
Don't single-Feint it — it Swap Wards your traps onto you; use Mass Feint or Indemnity.
It's very low health (1,915), so hold your hit on it until the minions are already down.
AoE the minions, then finish the Butterfly cleanly on a later round.
cheatNotes: Late wizards get Stunned — join on time.
Every two rounds it Empowers its side (+1 power pip) and secretly switches turn order.
Single Feint on it makes it Swap Ward your traps onto you — use Mass Feint or Indemnity.
If it dies before or the same round as its minions, it Blessings everyone back to full health — kill it last.
That Blessing also revives any minions defeated during the round.
It opens by summoning Young Morganthe, sometimes three minions at once.
After Young Morganthe dies it summons Young Morganthe and Roberto.
After those die it summons Young Morganthe, Roberto, and Broodmother.
